caption: A recorded meeting takes place in a professional setting with wood-paneled walls and desks. A group of people, mostly dressed in business attire such as suits and blazers, are seated around a table. In the initial scene, a man with a grey beard in a dark suit sits next to others, including a man in a vest and a woman with blonde hair. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts, focusing on a man with glasses in a dark suit who is gesturing with his hand while speaking. A woman in a beige cardigan and a man in a suit are seated behind him. Various items like water bottles, mugs, and a silver thermos are on the table. Each frame contains a banner with the "ORCA" logo and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage".
